name: cc-orchestrator
description: Transparent Claude Code task orchestration for Codex

scripts.check: npm run check:version-sync && npm run check:changelog && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.prepack: npm run check:version-sync && npm run check:changelog
scripts.test:cross-platform: node --test tests/args.test.mjs tests/changelog.test.mjs tests/claude-cli.test.mjs tests/fs.test.mjs tests/orchestration.test.mjs tests/orchestration-cli.test.mjs tests/prompts.test.mjs tests/render.test.mjs tests/sandbox-modes.test.mjs tests/skills-contracts.test.mjs tests/structured-output.test.mjs tests/version-sync.test.mjs
scripts.version: npm run sync:plugin-version && npm run check:version-sync && npm run check:changelog
